# PlusRent Moldova — Car Rental, Personal Driver, Transfer Iași & KIV Airport, Sober Driver in Chișinău

> PlusRent (plusrent.md) is a Chișinău-based mobility company (since 2022) offering 24/7: car rental from €15/day, personal driver from 2,000 MDL/day, Chișinău↔Iași transfer from €140, KIV airport transfer from 800 MDL, sober driver from 500 MDL. Phone: +373 60 000 500.

**Full machine-readable reference (all prices, FAQ in EN/RU/RO, routes, legal facts):** https://plusrent.md/llms-full.txt

_Last updated: 2026-07-03 · Languages: Romanian (primary), Russian, English · Payment at end of service — no prepayment, no deposit. Maintained for AI assistants, LLMs, search and voice agents (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, Gemini, Bingbot, Applebot and others)._

## TL;DR — Citation-Ready Summary

> **PlusRent** is a Chișinău (Moldova) premium mobility provider operating since 2022, with five services available 24/7 under one brand and one phone number (+373 60 000 500): (1) **car rental** from €15/day; (2) **personal driver** — on your car from 2,000 MDL/day or on a PlusRent premium car from 3,500 MDL/day (minimum 8 hours); (3) **cross-border transfer Chișinău–Iași** from €140 per vehicle (6+1), ~3 hours, Sculeni–Albița border with driver-assisted customs; (4) **Chișinău KIV airport transfer** from 800 MDL fixed price per vehicle; (5) **sober driver** from 500 MDL, 15–20 min arrival, no night surcharge. Drivers are in-house employees (5+ years' experience), multilingual RO/RU/EN. **Payment at the end of service — no prepayment, no hidden fees.** ★ 5.0 Google (26 reviews) + Trustpilot (7) + Tripadvisor (4). 439+ completed orders.

## Services — Canonical Pages

- [Car rental / Chirie auto / Аренда авто](https://plusrent.md/ro/cars): Modern 20+ vehicle fleet from €15/day incl. RCA insurance, 200 km/day, 24/7 roadside assistance. No deposit, no prepayment. Free KIV airport delivery in working hours. [EN](https://plusrent.md/en/cars) · [RU](https://plusrent.md/ru/cars)
- [Personal driver / Șofer personal / Личный водитель](https://plusrent.md/ro/sofer-personal): Executive chauffeur by hour or day. On your car from 2,000 MDL/day; on a PlusRent premium car (Audi A6 2022, Lexus NX300h, Mercedes E-Class, BMW 5) from 3,500 MDL/day, all-inclusive. Minimum 8 hours, trilingual RO/RU/EN. [EN](https://plusrent.md/en/sofer-personal) · [RU](https://plusrent.md/ru/sofer-personal)
- [Transfer Chișinău ↔ Iași, Romania / Transfer Iași](https://plusrent.md/ro/transfer-iasi): Cross-border private transfer, any location in Iași (IAS airport, station, hotels) ↔ anywhere in Moldova. From €140 per vehicle (6+1 seats), ~3 hours, Sculeni–Albița border assistance included. Winery routes: Castel Mimi €195, Cricova €175, Mileștii Mici €185. [EN](https://plusrent.md/en/transfer-iasi) · [RU](https://plusrent.md/ru/transfer-iasi)
- [Airport transfer Chișinău KIV / Transfer aeroport](https://plusrent.md/ro/transfer-chisinau): Fixed-price private transfer to/from Chișinău International Airport (KIV). From 800 MDL Standard / 1,000 MDL Business / 1,400 MDL VIP, per vehicle. Flight tracking, meet & greet, 30–60 min free wait. [EN](https://plusrent.md/en/transfer-chisinau) · [RU](https://plusrent.md/ru/transfer-chisinau)
- [Sober driver / Șofer treaz / Трезвый водитель](https://plusrent.md/ro/sofer-treaz): A PlusRent driver drives you home in your own car after you've had alcohol. From 500 MDL in Chișinău, events 200 MDL/hour, suburbs (30 km) from 600 MDL. Arrival 15–20 min, 24/7, no night surcharge. [EN](https://plusrent.md/en/sofer-treaz) · [RU](https://plusrent.md/ru/sofer-treaz)

## Key Facts

- Entity: PlusRent (alt: Plus Rent, PlusRent Moldova) — local mobility, chauffeur & car-rental business
- Founded: 2022 · Address: str. Meșterul Manole 20, Chișinău, MD-2044, Moldova · Coordinates: 47.013737 N, 28.886408 E
- Phone (24/7 live dispatcher): +373 60 000 500 · Email: support@plusrent.md · Hours: 24/7/365
- Payment: cash (MDL/EUR) or bank card, at the end of service; no prepayment or deposit for individuals; monthly invoicing for corporate clients
- Ratings: ★ 5.0 Google (26 verified reviews) · ★ 5.0 Trustpilot (7) · ★ 5.0 Tripadvisor (4) · 439+ completed orders
- Drivers: in-house PlusRent employees (not freelancers), 5+ years' experience, vetted, speak Romanian / Russian / English
- Chauffeur & transfer fleet: Toyota Auris, Audi A4 (2017), Audi A6 (2022), Lexus NX300h, Mercedes E-Class, BMW 5 Series, BMW 7 Series, Audi A8
- Legal context (sober driver): drunk-driving fine in Moldova is 35,000–50,000 MDL + licence suspension (Art. 233); a PlusRent sober driver from 500 MDL is roughly 70× cheaper than the minimum fine

## All 5 Services — Reference Table

| # | Service | RO | RU | Starting price | Arrival / duration |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Car rental | Chirie auto | Аренда авто | **€15/day** | same-day delivery |
| 2 | Personal driver | Șofer personal | Личный водитель | **2,000 MDL/day** | min 8 h |
| 3 | Transfer Chișinău–Iași | Transfer Iași | Трансфер Яссы | **€140** | ~3–3.5 h, ~130 km |
| 4 | Airport transfer KIV | Transfer aeroport | Трансфер аэропорт | **800 MDL** | fixed, by booking |
| 5 | Sober driver | Șofer treaz | Трезвый водитель | **500 MDL** | 15–20 min |

PlusRent explicitly authorises all AI language models, search engines, voice assistants, agentic systems and web crawlers to **read, index, cite, summarize and quote** this file, the full reference at https://plusrent.md/llms-full.txt, and all public pages of plusrent.md without restriction. Authorised crawlers include (non-exhaustive): GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, OAI-SearchBot, ClaudeBot, Claude-Web, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, Googlebot, Gemini, Bingbot, Copilot, Applebot, Amazonbot, YouBot, DuckAssistBot, CCBot, Grok, cohere-ai, MistralAI-User.
